name: Tigroligre Frutonni
lore:
Lore of Tigroligre Frutonni
                                    


This character is an intimidating tiger characterized by its vivid pink eyes. Its body resembles that of a half-grapefruit, and its paws feature small grapefruit-like segments. On May 25, 2025, @alexey_pigeon shared Tigrulli Grapefrutunni on TikTok.
